Test Case Description: Validate that all mandatory fields across the company profile are populated (e.g., Company Name, Category, Year of Incorporation, Logo, Headquarters)
Input Data (if applicable): Complete Fortune 500–style dataset with values for all required fields
Expected Result: Pass — Must satisfy field-level  Not Null rules and validation modes defined in metadata

Test Case Description: Validate that all optional enrichment fields are populated to maximize profile richness
Input Data (if applicable): Record populated across descriptive, operational, and growth fields
Expected Result: Pass — Profile meets data richness score threshold and completeness KPI

Test Case Description: Validate rejection when one or more mandatory fields are missing
Input Data (if applicable): Dataset missing Company Name or Year of Incorporation
Expected Result: Fail — Violates nullability and business rules requiring legal identity completeness

Test Case Description: Validate completeness across all ~150+ schema fields
Expected Result: Pass — All columns populated per business_rules and validation_mode

Test Case Description: Validate richness score calculation based on populated optional fields
Expected Result: Fail or Warn — Richness score below expected threshold; manual enrichment recommended

Test Case Description: Validate that populated fields conform to format and regex constraints system-wide
Input Data (if applicable): Full dataset with valid formatted values
Expected Result: Pass — All records pass schema-level format validation

Test Case Description: Validate completeness benchmark against Fortune 500 reference profiles
Expected Result: Pass — Meets enterprise data completeness and depth benchmark
